mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NMCP_FORM_DTL ( CD_GROUP_ID1, CD_GROUP_ID2, DOC_VER, DOC_CONTENT, USE_YN, CRET_ID, CRET_DT) VALUES ( #{cdGroupId1}, #{cdGroupId2}, #{docVer}, #{docContent}, #{useYn}, #{cretId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_FORM_DTL SET DOC_VER = #{docVer}, DOC_CONTENT = #{docContent}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, AMD_ID = #{amdId}, AMD_DT = SYSDATE WHERE 1=1 AND CD_GROUP_ID1 = #{cdGroupId1} AND CD_GROUP_ID2 = #{cdGroupId2} AND DOC_VER = #{docVer}
mapper.select: SELECT CD_GROUP_ID1 , CD_GROUP_ID2 , DOC_VER , DOC_CONTENT , USE_YN , CRET_ID , CRET_DT , AMD_ID , AMD_DT FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY CD_GROUP_ID2 ,DOC_VER
